hook.text: DE LIGT EYES RETURN AFTER BACK SURGERY

beats.text: THE DEFENDER HAS BEEN OUT SINCE NOVEMBER
HE HAD SURGERY AS PART OF HIS RECOVERY
DE LIGT IS TARGETING A RETURN THIS SUMMER

caption: Welcome news from the Carrington treatment room 🔴 Matthijs de Ligt has shared a positive update with fans as he continues his comeback from a back injury. The Dutch centre-back has been absent since November — missing the entirety of Michael Carrick's first months in charge. He underwent surgery to treat the problem and is now targeting a return this summer, ahead of the new campaign. Having De Ligt back at the heart of United's defence will be massive going into Champions League football. How much have you missed him? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football
